title: Lisa Gang
compiled_truth: Lisa Gang is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-15 to 2002-06-25), Lisa Gang sent 106 and received 657 emails, totalling 763 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jennifer Thome](people/jennifer-thome) (10), [Julie Sarnowski](people/julie-sarnowski) (8), [Virginia Thompson](people/virginia-thompson) (8), [Mo Elafandi](people/mo-elafandi) (8), [Shift Dl-Portland](people/shift-dl-portland) (6).
